name: SearchRefreshmentPoint
description: Returns the list of points of rest in the system according to certain parameters.
postconditions: The system returns a list of points of rest which meet your search criteria.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

UC9: Activate the search functionality of a point of rest.
Fill in the search form and submit.

quality_requirements: The system performs the operation in 15 seconds maximum
